zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby於大約1100年出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby39歲，母親Hawise de Vitré32歲。他於1135年與Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby于大约1100年出生在英国德比夏爾时，他的父亲Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby39岁，母亲Hawise de Vitré32岁。他于1135年与Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby was born about 1100, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby, was 39 and his mother, Hawise de Vitré, was 32. He married Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby in 1135, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1162, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby est né environ 1100, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Vitré, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby en 1135, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1162, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby um 1100 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby 39 und seine Mutter Hawise de Vitré 32. Er hat 1135 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby è nato il circa 1100 nel Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Vitré, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby nel 1135, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1162, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derbyが約1100年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derbyは39歳，母Hawise de Vitréは32歳であった。1135年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーでMargaret Peverell Countess of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Vitré(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1135년 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Vitré, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby em 1135, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1162, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby родился около 1100 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Vitré, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby в 1135 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1162 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby nació aproximadamente 1100, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ferrières 1st Earl of Derby, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Hawise de Vitré, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby en 1135, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1162, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
